hero.title: Traditional Chinese Medicine Care in New York, NY
hero.tagline: Traditional Healing Meets Modern New York
hero.clinicName: Pacific Meridian Care in New York, NY
hero.description: Dr. Maya Chen brings over 12 years of expertise in acupuncture, Chinese herbal medicine, and holistic care to New York families. Fluent in English and Mandarin, we bridge ancient wisdom with contemporary wellness needs.

services.title: Our Modalities

featured.title: Acupuncture
featured.subtitle: Restore balance and stimulate healing
featured.fullDescription: Acupuncture involves the insertion of fine, sterile needles at specific points to restore the flow of Qi. This ancient practice stimulates natural healing, reduces pain, and promotes overall wellness.
featured.shortDescription: Our primary treatment modality using fine needles to restore balance and promote healing

services.title: Moxibustion
services.subtitle: Warming therapy to invigorate Qi
services.fullDescription: Moxibustion involves burning dried mugwort (moxa) near acupuncture points to warm the meridians, strengthen Qi, and promote healing. The gentle heat penetrates deeply to nourish and invigorate the body.
services.shortDescription: Warm therapy to strengthen and energize

services.subtitle: Traditional healing methods backed by modern science

conditions.title: Conditions We Treat
conditions.subtitle: Traditional Chinese Medicine can help with a wide range of health concerns

conditions.title: Back Pain
conditions.description: Whether acute or chronic, acupuncture and TCM therapies provide effective relief without drugs or surgery

conditions.title: Headaches & Migraines
conditions.description: Effective treatment for tension headaches, migraines, and chronic head pain without medication

conditions.title: Anxiety & Panic Disorders
conditions.description: Natural, drug-free support for anxiety, panic attacks, and general nervousness

conditions.title: IBS & Digestive Issues
conditions.description: Effective relief for IBS, bloating, gas, and digestive discomfort

testimonials.title: Real Results from Real People
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from our patients about their healing journey

testimonials.name: Jennifer M.
testimonials.quote: After years of chronic back pain and trying everything, acupuncture with Dr. Maya Chen finally gave me relief. I'm pain-free and back to my active lifestyle!

testimonials.name: Robert T.
testimonials.quote: Dr. Maya Chen holistic approach helped me manage my anxiety without medication. The combination of acupuncture and herbs has been life-changing.

testimonials.name: Lisa K.
testimonials.quote: We are forever grateful to Dr. Maya Chen. After struggling with fertility, we're now proud parents of a beautiful baby girl!
